payload.answer: Saved the user’s intent to remember the URL for its stated relevance to memory architecture, but did not extract article-content memories because the fetch failed with a 404 network error.
citations: User input: Remember this article: https://example.com/missing why: useful for memory architecture.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404 network error, so no durable claims about the article contents were extracted.

memory_cards.statement: The user wants to remember the article at https://example.com/missing because it may be useful for memory architecture.

details: Committed only the explicitly supported user intent and stated reason.
No claims about the article contents were committed because the URL fetch failed.

repair_options: Provide a working URL or archived copy.
